'''Ta'al Pierc''' was a short, overweight, and middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] agent who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He worked for the planet's [[Imperial Research Station/Legends|Imperial Research Station]], where he added a program to their systems that would allow a user to bypass the facility's security measures. It was Pierc who informed the Alliance that the control systems for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] were being designed on Toprawa.

When the Empire learned that Pierc was a traitor, [[Facet Anamor]] was dispatched to deal with him. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Pierc was killed by Anamor in an alleyway in [[Toprawa City/Legends|Toprawa City]], a killing witnessed by [[Havet Storm]]. Storm later accidentally discovered Pierc's bypass, and when he sided with the Rebellion in its attempt to [[Battle of Toprawa|take]] the [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] and broadcast them to the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']], he used the bypass to circumvent the security systems and get access to them.

*''[[Jedi Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
